overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a rainy drive along a deserted highway. The camera moves steadily forward from the roadside shoulder, passing under a large overhead sign gantry and continuing down the wet asphalt with misty hills in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder approaching overhead sign gantry

events.description: camera merges from the roadside shoulder onto the main highway lane
passing directly underneath the large overhead highway sign gantry

agents.ego_description: driving forward along the highway shoulder then merging onto the main travel lane toward the overhead sign

entered.detail: large overhead metal structure spanning the highway with directional signage
continuous steel guardrail running along the left side of the road
striped concrete barrier at the base of the sign gantry support
rain-slicked highway surface with visible puddles and reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on the rain-soaked shoulder of a highway, with a metal guardrail running along the left and a large overhead sign gantry visible ahead on the right. The camera moves steadily forward, merging onto the main lane and passing underneath the sign structure as rain continues to fall, reducing visibility toward the misty hills in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with electrical infrastructure and distant signage

events.description: power line towers become prominent on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed down the center of the wet highway

entered.detail: tall electrical transmission tower with multiple cross-arms and cables
large roadside advertisement sign visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed the overhead sign gantry, the camera continues down the open highway through heavy rain. The metal guardrail recedes to the left mid-ground while power line towers emerge on the right. The wet road stretches ahead toward a distant billboard, with rolling hills barely visible through the rain and mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked highway that transitions from a confined roadside shoulder to an open, desolate stretch of road. It begins beside a metal guardrail on the shoulder, gliding steadily forward to merge into the main lane and pass underneath a large overhead sign gantry. As the camera clears the structure, the perspective opens up to the wide highway where the guardrail recedes into the mid-ground and power line towers emerge on the right. The scene then extends further down the wet asphalt toward a distant billboard, with the visibility remaining limited by heavy rain and mist clinging to the rolling hills ahead.
